title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 525.120 - Courts may prescribe rules
text:
525.120.  Courts may prescribe rules. — The court having jurisdiction may prescribe, by rule, the time and manner of excepting to and denying the answer of garnishees, of interpleading, exhibiting or filing papers, or taking any needful step in garnishment cases where the same are not prescribed by law.
(RSMo 1939 § 1571) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1407; 1919 § 1857; 1909 § 2424
